_doc: Phrases shown in the combat panel in place of enemy HP numbers. Each bracket below has 5 species-agnostic options (no blood / no bones / no breath references) so they read for any enemy. One option per bracket is comedic per spec. minHpFraction is inclusive; runtime walks the array top-down and picks the first matching bracket. Random choice per enemy is cached on the enemy object so the phrase stays stable while the enemy is in that bracket.

phrases: A few scrapes — barely fazed.
Looks mildly inconvenienced.
Eyeing the exits but not yet worried.
Pretty sure it can take a couple more like that.
Reminds itself it has a dental plan.
Visibly roughed up now.
Has dropped its smug grin.
Doing the math and not liking the answer.
No longer holding back.
Wishing it had called in sick today.
Starting to regret coming to work today.
Visibly worse for wear.
Stance has gotten a lot more defensive.
Has stopped trash-talking entirely.
Updating its will in its head.
In rough shape and slowing down.
Drawing on the last of its reserves.
Wobbling on every step.
Mostly held together by spite at this point.
Quietly composing a strongly-worded review of you.
On its last legs — one good hit away from oblivion.
Fading fast. Barely upright.
Whatever animates it is almost out.
About to file its final retirement papers.
Hanging on by sheer stubbornness.
